summary: Compared the P1-10 Retrieval Quality and Context Budget plan plus RAG proof/eval requirements against current DinoBrain repository and data-root artifacts. No repository files were edited. Current DinoBrain has deterministic RAG proof/eval artifacts, BM25/local-vector hybrid ranking, SQLite/index-backed retrieval, and structured memory-use tracing, but top gaps remain: local_text_hashing_v1 vectors are not real semantic embeddings; hybrid health can pass using non-semantic local hashes; context budget is item-limit based rather than token-budget based; required P1-10 canary state/test artifact names are missing or replaced by newer RAG artifacts; and RAG eval is a deterministic retrieval canary rather than answer-quality/Ragas-style evaluation.
decisions: Treat current dense vectors as local lexical/hash vectors, not semantic embeddings.
Treat rag_eval_status healthy as proof of deterministic local-vector retrieval canaries, not proof of real semantic RAG.
Classify context budget support as partial because current code enforces item limits and candidate caps, not configured token budgets.
Classify returned-node usage tracking as partial because finish_task/audit_memory_use fields exist, but the P1-10 retrieval/RAG eval does not use later-use signals as a canary metric.

Classify P1-10 traceability as incomplete because tests/retrieval-quality-improvements-smoke.mjs, tests/rag-quality-control-smoke.mjs, tests/acceptance/handoff-e2e.mjs, rag_canaries.json, and retrieval_golden_set.json are absent while newer .dino RAG artifacts exist.
next_steps: Add a real semantic embedding provider/index contract and make hybrid_contextual_v2 require provider metadata that is not semantic_embedding_provider:false.
Add configured token budget fields, per-pack estimated token accounting, and hard pass/fail assertions for context packs.
Map or create the plan-named P1-10 canary artifacts and tests, including OS final form, GitHub-only recovery, Codex/Claude parity, no premature agreement, and automatic green path canaries.
Integrate finish_task/audit_memory_use later-use signals into retrieval quality reporting, not only standalone memory audits.
Add answer-quality/faithfulness evaluation separately from deterministic retrieval canary scoring.
search_queries: P1-10 Retrieval Quality Context Budget RAG semantic embedding eval proof
context token budget limit get_context_pack retrieval canaries
